product_name: Beaded Bracelets for Women - Silver and Gold Boho Bracelets, Trendy Jewelry Gifts for Lover, Mom, Fr

caption.full_text: ad23r2 the camera view suddenly changes The video opens with a static shot of a beaded bracelet laid on a light coral surface. The bracelet is composed of alternating round black beads and metallic silver-toned beads, interspersed with larger, flat, round gold-toned and silver-toned beads, and a visible silver-toned lobster clasp. The background beyond the surface is softly blurred.
